# DAEE Engine

> Dominion Agent Economy Engine

## Overview

Behavioral trust scoring, MCP servers, and x402 payment gating for autonomous AI agents. Live Observatory tracking 4,500+ MCP servers with trust scores based on interaction history, success rates, latency, and uptime.

## Components

- Dominion Observatory: Live behavioral trust registry for MCP servers
- dominion-observatory-sdk: Agent behavioral telemetry SDK (npm)
- langchain-trust-gate: LangChain tool for trust-gated agent actions
- x402 Trust-Provider Interface: Open spec for trust in agent payments

## MCP Tools (8)

- get-trust-score: Trust score (0-100) for any MCP server
- query-server: Full behavioral profile with evidence
- list-servers: Browse tracked servers
- check-health: Server health and uptime
- get-categories: Discover by category
- search-servers: Find by name, URL, or capability
- get-attestation-history: Historical trust trends
- get-server-stats: Aggregate registry statistics

## Links

- Repository: https://github.com/vdineshk/daee-engine
- Observatory: https://dominion-observatory.sgdata.workers.dev
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/dominion-observatory
- Smithery: https://smithery.ai/servers/vdineshk/dominion-observatory
- Spec: https://github.com/vdineshk/daee-engine/blob/main/specs/x402-trust-provider-interface/v0.1/SPEC.md

## Install

npx dominion-observatory
